title: Option to have item view or update views in timelines and workload widgets
excerpt:
Our team uses dashboards for a lot of WIP meetings and it’s inconvenient to have to either remember exactly what an item meant or click to a table view to be able to see updates.

posts.author: JackHeadford (Jack Headford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team uses dashboards for a lot of WIP meetings and it’s inconvenient to have to either remember exactly what an item meant or click to a table view to be able to see updates.

Ideally having the entire item view with all tabs would be great but even just being able to see updates rather than the conversation button taking you to the board would be great?

Screen Shot 2022-10-14 at 10.51.05 am413×508 33.3 KB
